properties.remark: REPORTS OF FLASH FLOODING EARLIER THIS AFTERNOON IN SOME OF THE CREEKS AND ARROYS IN THE EASTERN PART OF THE CATALINA MOUNTAINS INCLUDING ROSE CANYON AND SCOUT RANCH AREA. ALSO SOME SMALLER ROCK SLIDES AND FLOODING WERE REPORTED ON THE MT LEMMON HIGHWAY. TIME ESTIMATED.
HOUSE COLLAPSED WITH 2 PEOPLE INSIDE DUE TO THUNDERSTORM WIND... THEY WERE RESCUED UNINJURED. ALSO SEVERAL POWER LINES DOWN AROUND SELLS.

FLASH FLOOD ALONG TANQUE VERDE WASH. THREE PEOPLE TRAPPED AT TANQUE VERDE FALLS AND ARE UNABLE TO CROSS THE WASH TO EXIT THE AREA DUE TO HIGH WATER. TIME IS APPROXIMATE BASED ON SUDDEN INCREASE IN FLOW PER STREAM GAUGE DATA.
